name: Premium Trial — Your picked designs, free with your trial (personalized, automated)
subject: The designs you picked are free with your trial
preheader: Remember the designs that caught your eye? They're unlocked.
note: Personalized Day 3 replacement for contacts WITH gf_design_preferences (workflow branch). BODY LIVES IN A PROGRAMMABLE EMAIL MODULE (Design Manager: /email-mark/your-designs, id 216902164578) because contact properties resolve lazily in raw-HTML widgets — string filters/parsing silently no-op there. body.html here is the module source; the push script uploads it via the CMS source-code API. design_catalog.json is the slug->title/image map source.
